system.notes:
Type: INT Booster · Strength (drug power rating, design system pg.124): +4 · Difficulty (to synthesize): 12 · Cost: 600eb · Duration: 1D6+1 hours.

Boost increases INT by +1 for a 2–7 hour period. A Boost addict has gained full tolerance — his INT is no longer increased, and he must have more Boost within twelve hours or be reduced to screaming fits and hallucinations.

Wiring note (Cyberpunk 2020 2nd ed. pg.123): INT +1 wired per the entry's explicit prose (“increases INT by +1 for a 2–7 hour period”), which wins over any Effects-Table “Increase INT by Strength” reading. “Strength: +4” is the design-system power rating — printed outside that system's own 1–3 range, a book inconsistency worth noting but not a stat bonus. The tolerance / withdrawal mechanic is GM-run prose. Manufacturer: not printed.

mechDrug.note: INT booster: +1 INT (the entry's explicit printed effect).
